summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 資料中心電力需求激增與電網現代化趨勢，Quanta Services 憑藉強勁的財報表現與積壓訂單，獲得分析師一致看好。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Surged on Strong Earnings and Improved Guidance
bullish.reason: 公司財報表現優異且上調財測，獲得機構投資人如 Sands Capital Management 的青睞，顯示基本面強勁。

bullish.title: Oppenheimer Upgrades Quanta Services (PWR) to Outperform
bullish.reason: Oppenheimer 將評級調升至「優於大盤」，並將其列為未來十年最佳美股之一，顯著提振市場信心。

bullish.title: Quanta Services: The Grid Integration Needs Builders, Not Just More Power
bullish.reason: 分析指出公司擁有創紀錄的積壓訂單，並鎖定 2028 年營收達 435 億美元的目標，凸顯其在電網現代化中的核心地位。

bullish.title: 5 Booming Industrial Stocks Set to Benefit More on AI Data Center Boom
bullish.reason: 將 PWR 列為 AI 資料中心電力與冷卻需求成長的直接受惠者，具備長期結構性成長動能。

bullish.title: NYSE:PWR Technical Breakdown: Quanta Services Inc Scores 9/10 on ChartMill Rating
bullish.reason: 技術指標評分高達 9/10，顯示股價處於強勢突破型態，有利於短期動能延續。

bullish.title: Why Analysts Are Betting On Quanta Services (PWR) For The Next Growth Cycle
bullish.reason: 強調其 15.49% 的上漲潛力，被視為土木工程類股中的首選標的。

bullish.title: How Is Quanta Services’ Stock Performance Compared to Other Infrastructure Stocks?
bullish.reason: 數據顯示 PWR 在過去一年顯著優於基礎設施產業平均水平，展現強大的相對強勢。

bullish.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Micron, Chevron and Quanta Services
bullish.reason: 獲 Zacks 評選為頂級選股，歸因於強勁的獲利成長與美國經濟穩健支撐。

neutral.title: If You Invested $1000 In Quanta Services Stock 20 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
neutral.reason: 僅為歷史績效回顧，對當前股價走勢無直接影響，故歸類為中性。
